chapter_title.en: Seeking the Place to Relieve Oneself and the Etiquettes of Entering and Exiting

text: 48 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «لاَ تَسْتَقْبِلِ اَلْهِلاَلَ وَ لاَ تَسْتَدْبِرْهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.48 - In another narration, it is stated:
"Do not face the crescent moon, nor turn your back to it (whilst relieving oneself)."
